gaps.why: These states do not hold a live RequestLifecycleLease, so CommandActionRecord cannot be fenced through the control-plane lease backbone yet.
gaps.currentBehavior: services/command-api/src/phase3-triage-kernel.ts emits explicit synthetic command witness refs and still appends TaskCommandSettlement plus transition journal rows.
gaps.closureRule: Replace synthetic witnesses only when an authoritative unowned-state command envelope is published; do not weaken tuple checks on live-owner commands.

gaps.why: The runtime kernel needs backend-local scopes such as move_to_queue, resolved_without_appointment, handoff_pending, and take_over_stale_task before the later Phase 3 consequence tracks publish final consumer settlement scopes.
gaps.currentBehavior: packages/domains/triage_workspace/src/phase3-triage-kernel.ts stores the precise backend action scope and keeps downstream consequence transitions fail closed on missing contract refs.
gaps.closureRule: Collapse to the final published settlement scope family only when those tracks freeze their consumer-visible action vocabulary.
